sglang.title: [diffusion] CI: fix nightly CI
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Changes


Make SGLang comparison runs use strict deterministic ports:

pass --strict-ports
derive dedicated HTTP / master / scheduler ports
preflight-check required ports before launch
clean up leftover SGLang processes before/after each comparison case



Improve failure handling in run_comparison.

sglang.title: fix(pd): tolerate kv pools without end_layer (Qwen3-Next disagg)
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
PR #24704 unconditionally reads self.token_to_kv_pool.end_layer in PrefillBootstrap._init_kv_manager, but HybridLinearKVPool (used by Qwen3-Next) only defines start_layer, causing:
AttributeError: 'HybridLinearKVPool' object has no attribute 'end_layer'

prefill_end_layer is only meaningful for comp

sglang.title: [codex] Optimize LTX2 split rotary kernel
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR improves the LTX2 split RoPE Triton kernel by processing multiple attention heads in each program instead of launching one program per token/head pair.

Batch up to 16 heads per _ltx2_split_rotary_kernel program.
Keep the existing BF16 rounding order that matches the PyTorch referenc

sglang.title: [diffusion] Default Qwen Image VAE precision to bf16
sglang.author: qimcis
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Peak memory: 64098 MB -> 58518 MB, 8.71% decrease
Motivation
I find that Qwen-Image checkpoints store vae weights in bf16, but our Qwen image pipeline currently sets vae_precision="fp32" as default, so we're essentially upcasting bf16 checkpoint tensors into fp32.
Previously users could set

sglang.title: [codex] Split diffusion quant CI coverage
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Move diffusion ModelOpt FP8 cases onto the regular 1-GPU multimodal generation suite.
Keep Blackwell-oriented diffusion quantization coverage in the B200 suite: ModelOpt NVFP4 cases plus a Qwen-Image Nunchaku FP4 lightning smoke case.
Allow Nunchaku SVDQuant validation on supported Blackwel

This PR updates the HiCache attach logic to use the actual active layer range, kvcache.end_layer -

sglang.title: [diffusion] add memory-aware component load order
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add a decoupled memory-aware component loading order helper.
Queue only components that still need real weight loading, then load DiT, encoder, and VAE-like components before small helpers.
Keep ordering stable within the same risk bucket, with numbered variants like transformer_2/text_enco

sglang.title: [AMD] ci: register 5 framework tests to run on AMD CI
sglang.author: michaelzhang-ai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
First batch of the NV→AMD coverage gap audit. On main, ~200 tests are registered for CUDA via register_cuda_ci(...) but not for AMD. This PR adds register_amd_ci(...) to 5 framework-level tests that have no NVIDIA-specific kernel paths in their test body, so they run on AMD CI per-commit.
Wh

sglang.title: [AMD][CI] Register Eagle constrained decoding test
sglang.author: yuychang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add AMD CI coverage for the EAGLE constrained decoding test so ROCm/AMD runners validate speculative decoding with constrained JSON and regex generation paths. This helps catch AMD-specific regressions for EAGLE, EAGLE V2, and xgrammar-backed constrained decoding.
